svg.desc: in0 — input node feeding values into the chain readGate — AND gate: gates input advance by i1 ack i0, i1 — chain inhibitor stages (shift register cells); cascade: value flows i0 → i1 directly inhibitRight0 — INHIBIT gate: fires only when i0=1 AND i1=0

g.text: backpressure: one value per pipeline cycle.
Data flow: value advances one step along the pipeline
Input to InhibitRightGate (left=1 AND right=0 → fires)
